data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax to match only tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`. **5 tests ran, all succeeded.**
